## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and next steps for Data Grid, a high-priority client account.](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Data Grid is pivoting from construction-focused ETL to AI agents on data, targeting sales/marketing use cases](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on programmatic SEO, aiming for high volume and aggressive growth](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Approach: Keyword gap analysis of competitors, clustering topics, and presenting organized themes/buckets](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Goal: Deliver execution quickly to build trust, then scale to 1000+ content pieces over the year](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

## Topics

### Client Context and Expectations

  - [Data Grid (formerly Torik) pivoted from construction ETL to AI agents on data](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Founded by Tiago, who had previous $60M exit; well-funded and connected](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Client wants to see fast execution to prove product-market fit for fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Budget: $39k/month, potential to grow to $1-2M/year account](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focus on programmatic SEO, not highly editorialized content](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Target sales/marketing personas, RevOps, and Salesforce/HubSpot users](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Use competitor keyword gap analysis (e.g., Bardeen, Gong, HubSpot, Zapier)](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Cluster topics into themes/buckets for easier presentation and planning](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Aim for 1000+ content pieces over the year, focusing on volume and speed](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### SEO and Topic Research Process

  - [Use tools like Ahrefs for competitor keyword analysis](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Filter keywords by volume and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Import data into Airtable for organization and clustering](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Create assignments based on competitive URLs](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Use roll-ups to show total volume and average difficulty for clusters](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)

### Content Production and Scaling

  - [Consider hiring inexpensive freelancers for examples and screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Leverage Data Grid's platform for some analysis tasks to save on AirOps costs](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [Balance between programmatic approach and selective manual review](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Potential to create new web experiences (e.g., "Answers" section) in the future](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Outbound and Additional Strategies

  - [Jimmy to set up outbound campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Explore GPTs people have built for additional topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Consider creating calculators or tools for sales/marketing metrics](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek and Sadira to collaborate on initial topic research and clustering](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Team to circle back on Tuesday to review progress](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Prepare presentation for Wednesday client meeting (2:30 PM Pacific)](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Include overview of topic opportunities, proposed focus areas, and Airtable walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Demonstrate fast execution and organized approach to build client trust](https://fathom.video/share/rYzY8Z4j8sn4zyAQ_L3YttbYz8Wdbcmv?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
